title: Hi Suhyun
summary: Hi Suhyun (Korean: 하이 수현) was a South Korean duo formed by YG Entertainment in 2014, consisting of Lee Hi and Lee Su-hyun from Akdong Musician. They released the number one single, "I'm Different", in November 2014.
text:
Hi Suhyun (Korean: 하이 수현) was a South Korean duo formed by YG Entertainment in 2014, consisting of Lee Hi and Lee Su-hyun from Akdong Musician. They released the number one single, "I'm Different", in November 2014.

Singles
Awards and nominations
